data.title: BlackRock's ETHA Ethereum holdings exceed 4 million, valued at over $18 billion
data.description: According to official data, after increasing its holdings by 97,695 ETH, the holdings of BlackRock's Ethereum exchange-traded fund ETHA have exceeded 4 million, reaching 4,083,485.9825 as of October 8, worth approximately US$18,165,836,576.8.

data.title: APENFT officially announced its upgrade to AINFT
data.description: APENFT officially announced its brand renewal today, officially transitioning to the AINFT phase, marking a pivotal step in its AI development. This upgrade not only represents a brand restructuring but also signals its commitment to driving innovation in digital art and Web 3 through intelligent technology. As a key component of the TRON ecosystem, AINFT will explore new frontiers in the integration of AI and blockchain, bringing a more intelligent, diverse, and tangible creative ecosystem to creators, developers, and the community.

data.title: DeFi Development to distribute dividends in the form of warrants and seek to raise $73.5 million to support SOL acquisition
data.description: Nasdaq-listed DeFi Development (DFDV) announced a special dividend in the form of warrants to holders of common stock as of October 23, 2025. Based on the outstanding common stock and convertible senior notes, the company expects to distribute up to approximately 3.3 million warrants, each entitling the holder to purchase one share of common stock at an exercise price of $22.50. Assuming all warrants are exercised, the company will receive $73.5 million to fund the acquisition of SOL and working capital. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Bank of America to Provide Reserve Custody for Anchorage’s Payment Stablecoin
data.description: Anchorage Digital Bank, a crypto-friendly digital bank, announced that Bank of America has become the reserve custody service provider for its payment stablecoin. It is reported that Anchorage Digital Bank is currently the first crypto-native bank to hold a U.S. federal charter and operates under the direct supervision of the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC). (Businesswire)

data.title: Credia officially launches Trust Alpha
data.description: Credia Layer officially launched on Trust Alpha at 11:00 AM (UTC) on October 9th. As the first project to be listed on Trust Alpha, Credia marks a milestone—it introduces the AI-powered, popular MEME search engine to the BNB ecosystem, ushering in a new chapter in the AI ​​Pilot for Trust Wallet's ecosystem launch. With this launch, users can now: • Participate in the $CRED Liquidity Pool • Stake $TWT to earn $CRED rewards • Experience AI pilot popular searches

data.title: Binance: 54.2 KGEN tokens will be added to the airdrop for users who successfully claimed it.
data.description: Binance announced on its X platform that it has airdropped an additional 54.2 KGEN tokens to users who successfully claimed the KGEN token airdrop.

data.title: BNB Smart Chain's gas fee of 0.05 Gwei is now adopted by the entire network
data.description: According to official news, BNB Chain announced that the BNB Smart Chain's gas fee of 0.05 Gwei has now been adopted by the entire network. Ecological partners including Binance Wallet, Trust Wallet and Aster have all switched the default gas fee to 0.05 Gwei.

data.title: U.S. Unemployment Data Delayed Due to Government Shutdown
data.description: According to PANews, the release of U.S. unemployment figures for the week ending October 4 has been postponed due to the ongoing government shutdown. The data, which includes initial jobless claims, the four-week average of jobless claims, and continuing claims, was not published as scheduled. The delay is attributed to the shutdown affecting government operations.

data.title: AMINA Bank announces the launch of POL staking service
data.description: AMINA Bank AG, a cryptocurrency bank regulated by the Swiss Financial Market Supervisory Authority (FINMA), announced a partnership with the Polygon Foundation to officially offer staking services for Polygon's native token, POL, and provide staking rewards to participants. (Businesswire)

data.title: Polkadot settles in Hong Kong: Stablecoin licensing and other regulations will promote Hong Kong's Web3 prospects
data.description: The Hong Kong Key Enterprises Office announced today that 18 companies, including the Polkadot Community Foundation, have settled in Hong Kong, bringing the total number of key enterprises to 102. Polkadot co-founder Vincent stated that he began working in education in Hong Kong three years ago. He expressed optimism about Hong Kong's low tax rates, abundant talent pool, and the government's recent regulatory oversight of stablecoin licensing. (Sing Tao Daily)

data.title: Institutional Investors Shift Cryptocurrency Strategies Amid Economic Changes
data.description:
According to PANews, Bitwise CEO Hunter Horsley has observed a shift in institutional investors' cryptocurrency strategies, moving from a focus on market capitalization to more refined, stock market-like investment analysis. This change is driven by the evolving macroeconomic environment, with U.S. interest rates nearing 4%, prompting investors to prioritize asset quality similar to stock selection strategies.

Throughout this year, several asset management firms have filed for ETFs targeting assets beyond Bitcoin, including Bitwise's filing for an AVAX spot ETF. Horsley believes that Bitcoin must first be recognized as a store of value before it can evolve into a payment network. He also noted that as the ecosystem matures, future market volatility may be less pronounced compared to historical cycles.

data.title: Exodus Movement, a US-listed company, released its September financial report: Treasury size increased to 2,123 BTC.
data.description: According to Globenewswire, Exodus Movement, Inc., a publicly listed US company, released its September 2025 financial update and monthly metrics report. The report shows that the company's operations continue to generate Bitcoin revenue, with its Bitcoin treasury growing to 2,123 BTC by the end of September. This follows news from September 8th that Exodus Movement increased its holdings by 29 Bitcoins in August, bringing its total holdings to 2,116.

data.title: LBank announces strategic partnership with Crypto cultural IP “Yeti” on its 10th anniversary
data.description: LBank has officially announced a strategic partnership with the crypto cultural IP "Yeti," creating a more engaging and interactive community experience for LBank's 10th anniversary celebration. LBank will officially celebrate its 10th anniversary on October 15th, launching a series of events with a total prize pool of $2 million. This collaboration incorporates Yeti's unique visual language and humorous expression, and features a creative short film to encourage global user participation. Against the backdrop of the recent meme craze, this collaboration opens up new possibilities for content expression and cultural co-creation within the crypto industry.

data.title: The market capitalization of BSC Chinese Meme Coin "Hakimi" briefly exceeded $30 million, up over 750%.
data.description: GMGN market data shows that the market capitalization of the BSC Chinese meme coin "Hakimi" briefly exceeded $30 million, increasing by over 750% in just one hour. Odaily reminds users that meme coins are subject to significant price fluctuations and advises investors to exercise caution.

data.title: Russia losing over $120 million a year in missing tax from crypto mining
data.description:
Russia’s state budget is losing a colossal sum of money in terms of uncollected taxes from illegal crypto mining operations in the country. The government in Moscow has been trying to bring the whole business out of the shadows, but despite legalizing it last year, less than a third of Russian miners are registered with […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-losing-120m-in-tax-crypto-mining/

data.title: Dorsey, Lummis Push for Bitcoin Tax Relief as Block Expands BTC Payments
data.description:
Block founder Jack Dorsey has pushed for a tax exemption for Bitcoin transactions, as Sen. Lummis confirms she’s “working on it. ”
source: https://decrypt.co/343583/dorsey-lummis-push-for-bitcoin-tax-relief-as-block-expands-btc-payments

data.title: BSC Ecological Meme rebounded briefly in the past hour
data.description: Market data shows that the BSC ecosystem Meme rebounded briefly. In the past hour: 4 rose by 10%, with a market value of US$189 million; meme rush rose by 47.85%, with a market value of US$23.62 million; Binance Life rose by 31.44%, with a market value of US$340 million; PALU rose by 15.53%, with a market value of US$45.73 million; customer service Xiao He rose by 24.5%, with a market value of US$13.15 million.

data.title: Bank of France wants EU crypto regulation under Paris-based ESMA
data.description:
The Bank of France’s governor called for crypto oversight to be given to the European Securities and Markets Authority, and for tightening MiCA’s rules on stablecoin issuance.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bank-france-esma-mica-stablecoin-rules?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3F__%3D1760011043690%26sid%3De86ff320c36af90c&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 123,000 USDT with a 0.23% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 09, 2025, 12:06 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 123,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 123,033.296875 USDT, with a narrowed 0.23% increase in 24 hours.
